case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. WILBURN, BRENDA et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DAVIS, MATTHEW DAVID SUBSTITUTED FOR KIMERLING, ALLYCE SUSAN AS ATTORNEY FOR HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT (UNLAWFUL DETAINER),PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION SERVED MAR-31-1996, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILBURN, BRENDA DOES I-X
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 03
#3 JUDGE CHOPPELAS, MBRADY/CSR, ALEONG/CLERK - C/C FOR TRIAL AFTER FURTHER SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS, CASE CONT. TO 5/20/96 AT 9AM IN DEPT. 1 TO SET.

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. REPRESENTATIVE, RACHEL SORIANO PRESENT W/ATTY MICHAEL RUSSELL. DEF. NOT PRESENT, NOR AN ATTY. AS HER REPRENTATIVE. COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF TRIAL SENT TO MS. SHERRI ANDERSON, ATTY. WHO HAD PREVIOUSLY MADE SPECIAL APPEARANCE FOR DEF. BRENDA WILBURN. PL. WIT, RACHEL SORIANO, S&E. PL. EXH.#1, DWELLING LEASE, ID. PL. EXH.#2, NOTICE OF RENT DETERMINA- TION, ID. PL. EXH.#3, NOTIFICATION OF CHANGE OF MONTHLY RENT, ID. PL. EXH.#4, TENANT ACCOUNTING LEDGER, ID. PL. EXH#5, 14 DAY NOTICE, ID. PL. EXH#6, 3 DAY NOTICE, ID. PL. EXH #7, DECL. OF SERVICE, ID. PL. EXH#1 - #7 ADMITTED INTO EVID. PL. CLOSING STATEMENT. JUDGMENT FOR PL - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 2511 SUTTER ST, #235, S.F, CA. - $292 RENT- $1,193.15 DAMAGES - COSTS PER COST BILL. EXH. ORDERED WITHDRAWN & PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILBURN, BRENDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2511 SUTTER ST, #235 - S.F, CA. $292.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $292.00, LEASE FORFEITED, $1,193.15 DAMAGES & COSTS PER COST BILL.
